# Agent Proposal

## Job To Be Done

What user workflow should this agent perform?

## Expected Inputs

What should the user provide, and what should the agent discover from the repo,
Endor Labs, source providers, or local tooling?

## Expected Outputs

What should the agent return or prepare? Include required JSON fields, PR/MR
body shape, comments, tickets, or policy artifacts if applicable.

## Safety Class

- [ ] Read-only
- [ ] Dry-run planning
- [ ] Mutating with explicit approval gates

## Required Evidence

What evidence must the agent cite before acting?

## Host Support

- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Codex
- [ ] Gemini CLI
- [ ] Antigravity CLI
- [ ] Cursor IDE
- [ ] Cursor SDK
- [ ] Portable runtime
